summary: Dropbox laid off 500 employees (16% of workforce) as part of a restructuring to focus on AI-powered products. CEO Drew Houston stated the company needed to redirect resources toward 'the next stage of growth driven by AI.'
ceo_quote: In an ideal world, we'd simply shift people from one team to another. And we've done that wherever possible. However, our next stage of growth requires a different mix of skill sets, particularly in AI and early-stage product development.

evidence.description: CEO explicitly cited AI strategy pivot as reason for restructuring and layoffs.

ai_technology: Dropbox Dash, Dropbox AI (internal AI products)
